rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FRANCES YEE CHIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/23/21. (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: No courtesy copy of the attorney's "Supplemental Bank Statement(s) and Reconciliation" filed on 6/9/21 has been received yet by the assigned Examiner. It was reviewed online as a ONE-TIME courtesy in hopes of avoiding a continuance. Issues to be addressed in connection with a fiduciary's petition must be addressed by the fiduciary in a verified pleading, not by her attorney. [CRC 7.103(c).] There was no Exhibit 4 or Exhibit 5 to the petition for final distribution filed on 11/20/20, so reference to those exhibits in the attorney's "Supplemental Bank Statement," etc., is meaningless. The one page of the bank statement attached to the attorney's "Supplemental Bank Statement," etc., is not a complete statement and no reconciliation is actually shown. A courtesy copy of the executor's verified supplement to her petition, stating her address for the record, attaching the full copy of the original bank statement, and addressing whether or not one of the two payments of $40 on 11/20/20 was a duplicate, must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 8/12/21 to avoid another continuance. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARK P PUESCHEL
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 08/16/2021 1) Must file proof of satisfaction of the creditor claims. 2) Must file and give notice of the petition on the mandatory judicial council form. 3) The caption of the proposed order must begin with Order for Final Distribution. [LRSF 14.36 I. 6) b.] 4) The proposed order on page 4 #5 states The Executor is authorized to distribute 50% to Brigitta M. Pueschel and 50% to Rudolph F. Pueschel. The proposed order must state specifically what is being distributed to each heir not just 50%. [LRSF 14.36 I. 6) b.] An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 8/2/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF THOMAS IVELI
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/23/21 . (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: Numerous papers have been filed since the last hearing on 2/1/21, courtesy copies of which have not all been provided to the assigned Examiner. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B. and C.] The only courtesy copies received as of 7/15/21 are an incomplete copy of the Second Amended Petition filed on 2/1/21, the improper proof of service filed on 2/10/21, the Declaration of Daniel B. Newbold Regarding Citibank Account Statements filed on 6/16/21, and the Declaration of Daniel B. Newbold Regarding First Foundation Bank Account Statements filed on 7/8/21. The only proper form of Notice of Hearing for conservatorship accountings is the mandatory JC form GC-020, on the reverse side of which is the proof of service that should be completed. The register of actions shows a third amended I&A filed on 2/4/21, showing a total estate of $2,448,039.31. It appears the accounting will need to be amended again, as the assets on hand have changed and, in any event, the second amended accounting did not actually have an accounting attached to it or any of the other exhibits referenced in that second amended petition. No attorney fee declaration appears to have been filed yet. Courtesy copies of all other papers in connection with the Second Amended Petition for Approval of First and Final Account (in support thereof or objecting thereto) - or the complete Third Amended First and Final Account - must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 8/12/21. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF YOUNG GOON LI
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/16/2021. 1) The court is still unable to determine the signature on Nathaniel Li on the waiver of account alleged signed 2/26/2021 in the Supplement that must be signed and verified by Petitioner. Please submit a new signed Waiver of account with a signature that can be viewed by the court. 2) The 07/08/2021 Supplement was not responsive to this issue as the responsive is not detailed schedules of receipts and must be signed and verified by Petitioner. Please file a detailed schedule of receipts with dates, amounts, and a description of what the receipts was for and from whom it was paid for all items listed under receipts. Notwithstanding the waiver of account, if the petition and report requests statutory commissions or fees based on any amount other than the amount of the Inventory and Appraisal, detailed schedules of receipts and gains and losses on sales must be included. (CRC 7.705). An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 8/2/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MAUREEN E. CROWE TRUST DATED JULY 16, 2016
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition: For Removal, Appointment, Or Confirmation Of Trustee; For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Damages; To Compel Trust Accounting
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Due to COVID-19, counsel and parties should appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall whenever possible. Please review the 10th amended general order on the court's website for information on appearing remotely. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 875 8017 7925 and password is 722809. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING USING THEIR FULL NAME.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LIA FAIL 2004 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Determine Distribution Of Trust Property
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. This matter will be called with PTR-20-303964. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 10th Amended General Order which took effect on 06/28/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARTE TORRE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing for the sole purpose of admitting the will dated 6/14/2001 . [Probate Code Section 8225.] No appearance is required. Status of closing the estate will be set on 8/2/2022. A petition for final distribution or a report of status with a petition requesting additional time for estate administration must be filed at least two weeks before 8/2/2022. Appearance will be required on 8/2/2022 if no petition has been filed.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FRANK B. SIMMONS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/16/2021. 1) Petitioner must file notice of the petition. Matter continued for proper notice. 2) Please provide the court order appointing James C. Meeks is administrator of the estate of Frank B. Simmons as the petition alleges James C. Meeks is Administrator of the Estate of Frank B. Simmons and it appears James C. Meeks has not been appointed as administrator. 3) The petition must have an attachment 7. (This is different from attachment 7a and 7b. See petition page 1 paragraph 7.) Petition does not conform to LRSF 14.26. 4) Please file evidence showing James C. Meeks is a spouse of Decedent. 5) A copy of the current vesting deed must be filed for any real property. [LRSF 14.26]. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 8/2/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JACQUELINE MARIE BACIOCCO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing for the sole purpose of admitting the will dated 7/15/2015. [Probate Code Section 8225.] No appearance is required. Status of closing the estate will be set on 8/2/2022. A petition for final distribution or a report of status with a petition requesting additional time for estate administration must be filed at least two weeks before 8/2/2022. Appearance will be required on 8/2/2022 if no petition has been filed. (The Declaration of Real Property is no longer required.)
